metadata.description: Replay-support check for shortlisted native-heavy candidates.

results.label: N2_exact_hc_to_exact_hc
results.message: TypeError: waveform_primitive_from_gate received gate of type 'PrimitiveGate', which is not supported. Supported gate types are: QubitRotation, Displacement, SQR, ConditionalPhaseSQR. For SNAP and FreeEvolveCondPhase gates, use the model-backed simulation path (simulate_sequence / hamiltonian_time_slices) rather than the waveform bridge.
